18701.history: Sunk by gunfire (accidental) in Stokes Bay on 4 June 1947

18707.history: Sunk by the German submarine U-764 in the English Channel on 25 August 1944. Hit by U-boatSunk on 25 Aug 1944 by U-764 (Bremen).

18725.history: Foundered in tow on 10 August 1944, place unknown

18758.history: Lost off Normandy, France on 7 June 1944.

18805.history: Lost on 23 October 1944 in heavy weather in the English Channel. The ship had broken her back and finally broke in two. The front section was sunk by gunfire.
